description: Public surfaces of netbox-automation: the netbox-auto CLI (Typer commands), the Flask review web app (HTTP routes), Collector Protocol (extension surface for new sources), staging DB schema, the configuration env-var contract, and external integrations (NetBox, MikroTik, Proxmox, Unbound).

netbox-auto.role: Typer app — top-level `--config/-c` and `--version/-V`. Loads config and initializes SQLite DB on every invocation

subcommands.discover: Run all configured collectors, merge by MAC, persist to staging DB
subcommands.serve: Start the Flask review web UI (default 127.0.0.1:5000, --host/--port/--debug)
subcommands.push: Push approved hosts to NetBox + DNS (--dry-run, --skip-netbox, --skip-dns)
subcommands.status: Print host counts by status/type and the most recent DiscoveryRun summary

GET /hosts.role: Hosts table sorted by last_seen desc; renders templates/hosts.html

POST /hosts/bulk.role: Bulk status/type update across selected hosts

GET /reconcile.role: Reconciliation view — new/matched/stale relative to NetBox; renders templates/reconcile.html

POST /reconcile/import.role: Trigger import_netbox_devices() to pull existing NetBox inventory into the staging DB

collector_extension_surface.Protocol: src/netbox_auto/collectors/base.py — Collector(name property, collect()) + DiscoveredHost dataclass
collector_extension_surface.MAC normalization: DiscoveredHost.__post_init__ lowercases the MAC and converts dashes to colons

Builtin collectors.DHCPCollector: MikroTik DHCP leases via librouteros (file: src/netbox_auto/collectors/dhcp.py)
Builtin collectors.ScannerCollector: ARP scan via scapy — requires root for raw sockets (file: src/netbox_auto/collectors/scanner.py)
Builtin collectors.SwitchCollector: MikroTik switch MAC tables — returns dict[mac -> 'switch_name:port'] (file: src/netbox_auto/collectors/switch.py)

tables.host: id PK, mac UNIQUE INDEXED, hostname, ip_addresses JSON, source, switch_port, status, host_type, first_seen, last_seen, discovery_run_id FK, netbox_id, notes; index ix_host_mac_lookup

configuration_env_vars.format: NETBOX_AUTO_<SECTION>__<FIELD> (double underscore between section and field)

external_integrations.MikroTik RouterOS API: librouteros (port 8728 default) — DHCP leases + switch MAC tables
external_integrations.NetBox API: pynetbox — device/VM/IP/cable CRUD with lazy connection
external_integrations.Unbound DNS: paramiko SSH — atomic replace of /etc/unbound/local.d/local.conf (path configurable per host)
